verses.text: Ka ta aw, ka pilna leh ka thumuhnate, limtakin ngai-in hong za in
Tua hi leh a kilawmin na gamtatzia ding na thei ding a, na kampaunate in na pil lamtak hong kilangsak ding hi
Numei paktatte' kampau khuaizu bangin khum mahmahin a thugente uh a neel dakdak hangin
a tawpna-ah lungkhamna leh natna simloh nangma tungah bangmah dang hong guanlo hi
Amah in sihna gamah nang hong paipih ding a, ama tot lampi pen sihna mun tun'na lampi ahi hi
Nuntakna lampi-ah amah omlo a, nang na phawkloh hangin amah lam pialin a vakvai ahi hi
Tate aw, tu-in ka thugente limtakin hong ngai un la, ka thugente mangngilh kei un
Tua bang numei tawh kinehkha kei un la, a inn gei nangawnah paikha kei un
Tua bang na hih kei uh leh na min hoihna teng uh midang tungah tung ding a, hehpihna a neilo mite' khutlum tawh na khan'sih ding uh hi
Khualmite in na neihsa teng uh la ding a, na sepsa khempeuh uh midangte in ngah ding uh hi
Na sih kuan uh ciangin thumin na tau ding uh a, gawngin na guhguak bekun na om ding uh hi
Tua ciangin, “Bang hangin thu thei hoh lo a, hong kihilhna mang hoh lo ka hi hiam
Kei hong hilh siate' thu ka mang nuam kei a, amau' hong hilhnate ka don keikha hi
Tua ahih manin tu-in ka cimawh vat a, mi' mai-ah ka min a sia hi,” na ci ciat ding uh hi
Na zi' tungah citak in la, amah bek itin nei in
Pasal dang tawh va vakzau-in kongzing lakah va mawhkha ding hi
Na zi pen nangma-a' ding bek hi a, midangte tawh na neihkhawm ding hilo hi
Tua ahih ciangin na zi tawh lungkim in la, na ten'pih numei tawh lungdam in
A ithuai a ngaihbaangin ngaihsun tawntung in la, ama ngaihbaan'na tawh lungdamin, ama hong itna tawh lungkim in
Ka ta aw, bang hangin numei dang lunggulh ding a, numei dangte' ngaihbaan'na iplah ding na hi hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in na gamtatna khempeuh hong mu a, na paina khempeuhah nang hong en kawikawi hi
Migilopa' mawhna thangzak bang hi a, ama mawhna thang sung mahah amah a awk hi
Ama pumpi ki-uk zolo ahih manin amah in sihlawh a, ama hailuatna in hankhuk sung a tun' hi.
